response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the 'All For One' lyrics provided in the reference, but the video contains a much larger portion of the song and a teaser for a second song titled 'BREAKING FREE'. I have transcribed the full vocal performance and included on-screen text for the concert title and member introductions. Timestamps are precisely aligned with vocal bursts and visual cues.
